name: rhino-mcp-platform
description: Desktop Connector for Rhino3d and Grasshopper
long_description: Bridges Claude to the Rhino MCP Platform plugin running inside Rhino. Requires the Rhino-MCP-Platform Rhino plugin to be installed, and the `RhinoMCP` command to have been run in Rhino to start the HTTP server.

prompts.name: getting-started
prompts.description: Useful for your first time trying the Rhino3D claude desktop connector
prompts.text: TODO: Claude fill this in would ya?

instances.title: Rhino instances
instances.description: Comma-separated list of name=url pairs, e.g. A=http://localhost:4862,B=http://localhost:4863. Tool names get prefixed with the instance name. A bare URL is allowed when there's only one instance.
